title: NebulaDiagnostic
description: One agent-oriented diagnostic record. `nebula check --json` and `nebula run --json` emit a JSON array of these on stderr when compilation or execution fails (an empty array `[]` on success for `check`). The same shape is returned as `DiagnosticJson` by the `nebula-host` embedding crate.

code.description: Stable structured error code. The letter identifies the category: S=syntax/parse, T=type, R=runtime, P=probe, L=module load/import.

message.description: Human- and agent-readable description of the diagnostic, without the code prefix.

span.description: Source location of the diagnostic. Omitted entirely when no location is available (e.g. some runtime errors).
Byte span into the source, with optional 1-based line/column when source text was available.

file.description: Source file path, or null when the diagnostic is not tied to a named file.

start.description: Inclusive start byte offset into the source.

end.description: Exclusive end byte offset into the source (>= start).

line.description: 1-based line number of `start`. Present only when source text was available.

column.description: 1-based column number of `start`. Present only when source text was available.

examples.message: type mismatch: expected Int, found Str
